What We Do

Our Services

Professional siding contractor solutions tailored to your needs.

Vinyl Siding Installation

Durable and affordable vinyl siding installation for Tulsa homes.

Learn More →

Fiber Cement Siding Installation

Durable and beautiful fiber cement siding for Tulsa's discerning homeowners.

Learn More →

Siding Repair Services

Fast and reliable siding repair services to protect your Tulsa home.

Learn More →

Siding Replacement

Upgrade your Tulsa home with new, high-quality siding.

Learn More →

Soffit and Fascia Repair & Installation

Protect your roof and home with expert soffit and fascia services.

Learn More →

Trim Installation and Repair

Providing professional trim installation and repair services in Tulsa.

Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality siding contractor services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

Old Town Siding Co. did an incredible job on our vinyl siding installation! The team was professional, efficient, and the siding looks fantastic. They even cleaned up everything thoroughly. We highly recommend them!

Sarah M.
★★★★★

We had some storm damage to our fiber cement siding. Old Town Siding Co. came out quickly and did a great job repairing the damaged sections. The repairs are seamless, and you can't even tell there was ever any damage.

David K.
★★★★

From the initial consultation to the final inspection, the team at Old Town Siding Co. was a pleasure to work with. They installed fiber cement siding on our home, and it looks amazing. We get compliments on it all the time. Worth the investment!

Jessica L.
★★★★★

Old Town Siding Co. repaired some damaged soffit and fascia on our home. They were prompt, professional, and the price was very fair. We'll definitely use them again for any future siding needs.

Robert B.
★★★★★

We had our old wood siding replaced with vinyl siding by Old Town Siding Co. The process was smooth, and the crew was very respectful of our property. We're happy with the new look and the added protection.

Emily S.
★★★★

The trim work done by Old Town Siding Co. really elevated the look of our home. They paid attention to every detail and the results are outstanding. Professional, reliable, and great value.

Michael P.
★★★★★

How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose Old Town Siding Co

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How long does vinyl siding last?
With proper installation and maintenance, vinyl siding can last for 20-40 years or more.
Is vinyl siding energy efficient?
Vinyl siding can improve your home's energy efficiency by providing an extra layer of insulation. We also offer insulated vinyl siding options for enhanced performance.
How do I clean vinyl siding?
Vinyl siding can be easily cleaned with soap and water or a pressure washer on a low setting.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Old Town Siding Co.
